extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Local tools and integrations that make Shikin useful day to day.
extensions.heroTitle: Everything here works with your personal vault, not a cloud account.
extensions.heroDescription: Use this page as the control center for imports, API keys, local database access, MCP automation, and app maintenance.

csvImport.title: Statement Import
csvImport.description: Import bank CSV files into transactions, map fields, and review rows before they touch your ledger.

mcp.title: CLI and MCP Server
mcp.description: Automate the same local finance data from terminals and MCP-compatible clients using the bundled command surface.

marketData.title: Market Data Keys
marketData.description: Connect Alpha Vantage or Finnhub keys so investment prices can refresh from your own configured providers.

localData.title: Local Data Vault
localData.description: Inspect where Shikin stores its SQLite database and keep ownership of your account, budget, and transaction history.

updates.title: Signed Updates
updates.description: Desktop builds check signed releases on startup so your personal finance app stays current without data leaving the device.
